raw.message: ポケポケは、バトルだけじゃない！気軽にコレクションを楽しもう

hook.summary: Rapid-fire showcase of legendary bird Pokémon cards with nostalgic Japanese narration.
hook.visual_action: Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres GX cards fly into the frame against a dark, glowing background with kinetic text.
hook.text_overlay: あの頃の 憧れの ポケモンを
hook.voiceover_transcript: あの頃の、憧れの、ポケモンを

scene_flow: Articuno GX card reveal with nostalgic text overlay.
Zapdos GX card flashes on screen with energetic sound effects.
Moltres GX card appears, completing the sentence about collecting Pokémon.
Transition to a smartphone screen showing the digital card collection interface.
Final end card featuring the game logo, '2 packs free daily' offer, and download buttons.
on_screen_text: ポケポケで コレクションしよう
audience_proxy: Nostalgic Pokémon fans and card collectors aged 20-40 who enjoy digital collecting.
